app.title: Polymarket Trading Dashboard
app.statusLine: Smart-wallet ledger · state {{time}} · bot poll {{pollSeconds}}s · frontend refresh {{refreshSeconds}}s

meta.overview: Current view: overview, focused on decisions, positions, orders, and critical alerts.
meta.wallets: Current view: wallets, focused on the core wallet pool, profiles, scores, and source quality.
meta.ops: Current view: ops, focused on startup, monitor, reconciliation, risk, and runtime status.
meta.review: Current view: review, focused on archives, journal, signal replay, attribution, and exit samples.

reason.trading_mode_cancel_pending_entry: Trading mode changed, cancel pending entry

reason.entry_wallet_mismatch: Entry wallet does not match current position
reason.netting_limited: Condition exposure is near the cap

replay.noPrimaryReason: No explicit skip reason in recent cycles

panel.title: Candidate Queue

panel.statusEmpty: No new candidates right now. Keep watching the operator / monitor / reconciliation panels below.

panel.queueNote: Keep only the high-signal fields here. Secondary metrics live in hover and detail panes.

emptyBody.noMatch: Try another keyword, status, or sort order.

feed.noItems: No news items available right now

facts.operatorCleanupWaiting: clear_stale_pending has not been requested yet

issues.operatorRequestedDetail: clear_stale_pending has been requested and is waiting for the next runner cycle.
issues.currentDiagnosisDetail: Startup checks, monitor, and reconciliation have no standout issues right now. Keep watching the next report cycle.

pending.title: Pending Orders
pending.empty: There are no active pending / stale orders

focus.title: Diagnostic Focus
focus.hint: Click a startup check or pending order to inspect details
focus.summary: This area shows structured details for startup checks or pending orders so the operator can quickly decide the next step.
focus.waitingHint: Click a startup check or pending order to inspect details
focus.waitingSummary: This area shows structured details for startup checks or pending orders so the operator can quickly decide the next step.
focus.startupSummaryEmpty: This startup check has no extra detail
focus.pendingSummaryEmpty: This pending order has no extra detail

empty.title: No diagnostics yet
empty.detail: There is no diagnostic detail available for this window.

detail.title: Exit Sample Detail
detail.hint: Click an exit sample to inspect detail
detail.summary: This area shows the source wallet, topic, current position context, and the latest exit record for a single exit sample.

empty.title: No exit samples yet
empty.detail: There are no exit records to replay in this window.
empty.filteredSamples: No exit samples match the current filters

detail.title: Exit Sample Runtime
detail.currentPositionClosed: No current position; exit may already be complete

detail.title: Trace Decision Chain
detail.hint: Click a position, exit sample, or candidate signal to inspect the full chain
detail.summary: This area shows the full decision chain for a trace, from the first entry through add, trim, and exit.

empty.title: No trace yet
empty.detail: There is no signal chain to replay in this window.
empty.cycleCandidates: No candidate signals in the selected cycle

empty.title: No attribution samples yet
empty.detail: There are no attribution results to show in this window.

callout.title: Execution and Monitor Aligned
callout.detail: Execution and monitor pipelines are aligned

empty.title: No monitor report yet
empty.detail: There is no monitor runtime for this window yet.

callout.alignedTitle: Execution and monitor pipelines are aligned
callout.startupBlockedBody: Fix smoke, account, or broker prerequisites before discussing parameters or strategy performance.
callout.reconciliationFailedBodyFallback: Check ledger drift, broker sync, and stale pending orders first.
callout.observeTitle: Execution layer has warnings; avoid tuning parameters for now
callout.observeBodyFallback: Handle stale pending orders, snapshot age, and reconcile age first.

eod.pnlDetail: internal vs ledger {{internalDiff}} · broker floor gap {{brokerGap}}

banner.title: Ops Gate
banner.detail: This area surfaces the combined conclusion from startup, self-checks, monitor, and reconciliation.

actions.title: Action Suggestions
actions.waitingDetail: This section will propose the next action based on startup, monitor, and reconciliation.

opsGate.titleFallback: Ops gate is waiting for data
opsGate.detailFallback: This area surfaces the combined conclusion from startup, self-checks, monitor, and reconciliation.
opsGate.emptyActionDetail: This section will propose the next action based on startup, monitor, and reconciliation.

state.readyDetail: Startup, self-checks, monitor, and reconciliation have no blockers right now; keep watching strategy and execution quality.
state.blockDetailFallback: Startup checks failed or live prerequisites are missing. Fix environment and account issues first.
state.escalateFailDetail: Reconciliation is currently failing{{summarySuffix}}. Stop parameter changes and generate an EOD reconciliation report to verify ledger drift.
state.escalateFallback: The ledger and broker fact layers may have drifted. Stop parameter changes first.
state.observeTitle: Warnings are active; observe before tuning
state.observeWarnDetail: Reconciliation is currently warning{{summarySuffix}}. Check freshness and sync age before deciding whether monitor is only sample-thin.
state.observeMonitorDetail: Monitor is still in observe mode: {{focus}}. Add more samples or refresh stale reports before changing parameters.
state.observeStaleDetail: Monitor reports are stale: {{windows}}. Refresh the 30m / 12h reports before deciding whether tuning is needed.
state.observeFallback: This currently looks more like execution warning noise than a strategy signal conclusion.

networkSmoke.title: Rerun network smoke
networkSmoke.detail: Run make network-smoke first and confirm geoblock / endpoint health; current note: {{message}}.

liveCredentials.title: Verify live account and signature config
liveCredentials.detail: Check PRIVATE_KEY, FUNDER_ADDRESS, and CLOB_SIGNATURE_TYPE so API credentials can be derived reliably; current note: {{message}}.

marketPreflight.title: Restore market preflight
marketPreflight.detail: Confirm the live broker has a market client configured, or book / midpoint / tick preflight will reject immediately; current note: {{message}}.

orderStatusSupport.title: Fix broker order-query support
orderStatusSupport.detail: Verify the py-clob-client version and adapter layer so get_order / get_orders are available; current note: {{message}}.

heartbeat.title: Confirm heartbeat strategy
heartbeat.detail: There are currently {{pendingCount}} pending orders, but the SDK may lack heartbeat support. Avoid relying on long-lived resting orders for now; current note: {{message}}.

userStream.title: Check user stream dependencies
userStream.detail: Install websocket-client and verify USER_STREAM_* config, otherwise the system falls back to polling reconcile; current note: {{message}}.

clobHost.title: Verify CLOB host
clobHost.detail: Check live CLOB host configuration and network reachability; current note: {{message}}.

ledgerDrift.title: Review ledger drift first
ledgerDrift.detail: Current internal ledger gap is {{diff}}. Generate make reconciliation-report first and verify realized PnL for the day.

stalePending.title: Handle stale pending orders
stalePending.detail: There are still {{count}} stale pending orders. Check broker open orders / recent fills first, and cancel if needed before moving on.

syncAge.title: Refresh broker / account sync
syncAge.detail: Sync freshness is aging out: account {{accountAge}}, reconcile {{reconcileAge}}, events {{eventAge}}. Verify the daemon and user stream are still updating.

inconclusive.title: Build more sample windows
inconclusive.detail: Monitor still has {{windows}} inconclusive windows. Keep observing execution samples and do not tune parameters off zero-sample windows.

monitorSummary.title: Handle execution issues in monitor summary first
monitorSummary.detail: Read the raw 30m / 12h monitor guidance first and refresh stale windows; current 30m {{monitor30}} / 12h {{monitor12}}.

consistency.title: Keep watching shadow / live consistency
consistency.detail: The gate is currently clear. Keep comparing the 12h monitor with EOD reconciliation and watch whether the next startup / broker sync cycle stays stable.

empty.title: Not selected
empty.subtitle: Click a wallet row to inspect detail
empty.summary: This area shows scoring logic, historical samples, and realized performance for a single wallet.

candidateRecommendation.marketDataUnavailable: There is no sell-side liquidity to follow right now. Watch first to avoid hitting a thin book.
candidateRecommendation.marketWindowElapsed: This short-duration market has already ended, so the old signal is no longer actionable.
candidateRecommendation.marketNearClose: This short-duration market is close to ending, so skip chasing the last stretch.
candidateRecommendation.marketClosed: The market is closed and cannot open a new position.
candidateRecommendation.marketInactive: The market is not active right now, so stay out for now.
candidateRecommendation.marketNotAcceptingOrders: The market is not accepting orders right now, so watch first.
candidateRecommendation.spreadTooWide: The spread is too wide right now, so watch first.
candidateRecommendation.chaseTooHigh: Price has already moved too far, so chase risk is elevated.
candidateRecommendation.momentumTooWeak: Short-term momentum has weakened, so wait for a better entry.
candidateRecommendation.existingPositionConflict: There is already a position in this market, so avoid duplicate exposure.
candidateRecommendation.sellCrossWalletExit: {{count}} wallets are exiting in resonance, so trim first.
candidateRecommendation.sellFullExit: The source wallet has mostly exited, so prioritize following the exit.
candidateRecommendation.sellPartialExit: The source wallet is trimming, so a partial exit fits better.
candidateRecommendation.existingPositionPresent: There is already a live position, so watch before adding again.
candidateRecommendation.buyMomentumStrong: 5m/30m momentum is both strengthening, so {{action}} is more aligned with trend.
candidateRecommendation.buyMomentumWeak: 5m/30m momentum is both weak, so be cautious before {{action}}.
candidateRecommendation.follow: Score {{score}} with a strong wallet tier supports a normal follow.
candidateRecommendation.buyNormal: Score {{score}} suggests a solid opportunity for normal-size follow.
candidateRecommendation.buySmall: Score {{score}} is worth following, but a smaller probe size fits better.
candidateRecommendation.watchDefault: Score {{score}} suggests waiting for more confirmation.

marketState.label: Market State
marketState.detail: Prefer authoritative market metadata for closed, active, accepting-orders, and end-time state.

spread.label: Spread
spread.detail: A wider spread makes chasing less attractive.

chase.label: Chase Distance
chase.detail: How far the live ask is above the source price.

momentum.label: Price Momentum
momentum.detail: Momentum helps judge whether the order is trend-following or counter-trend.

existingPosition.label: Existing Position
existingPosition.detailDefault: An existing position is already open.

exit.label: Exit Fraction
exit.detail: Sell signals mainly reflect the source wallet trimming or fully exiting.

resonanceExit.label: Resonance Exit
resonanceExit.detail: When multiple wallets trim together, exit priority rises.

candidateExplanation.trendStrong: 5m/30m trend is aligned to the upside.
candidateExplanation.trendWeak: 5m/30m trend is aligned to the downside.
candidateExplanation.buyMomentumStrong: Short-term momentum is aligned and stronger, so chase pressure is lower.
candidateExplanation.buyMomentumWeak: Short-term momentum is aligned and weaker, so do not rush the chase.

api.forceInvalidBool: Force refresh must be true or false
api.csvRequiresSingleScope: CSV export requires a single scope
api.candidateActionRequired: Candidate ID and action are required

auth.title: Polymarket Dashboard Access
auth.heading: Protected Access
auth.description: This dashboard requires an access token. Open a shared link with {{tokenQuery}} or enter the access token here.

runtime.liveRequiresSecrets: LIVE mode requires PRIVATE_KEY and FUNDER_ADDRESS

cli.warnOnly: Print warnings only and do not exit non-zero on problems

problem.missingExample: Missing .env.example; expected keys cannot be validated

warning.blockbeatsUnavailable: BLOCKBEATS_API_KEY is not set; the shared BlockBeats skill and scripts/blockbeats_query.sh will be unavailable
warning.remoteAlertMissing: DRY_RUN=false has no remote alert channel configured (webhook or telegram)

cli.description: Safe preflight for live connectivity smoke. Does not place orders.

check.dryRunDisabled: DRY_RUN=false is required for live smoke preflight
check.liveSecrets: PRIVATE_KEY and FUNDER_ADDRESS must both be configured
check.liveAdmissionFlags: LIVE_ALLOWANCE_READY, LIVE_GEOBLOCK_READY, and LIVE_ACCOUNT_READY must all be true
check.remoteAlertConfigured: A remote alert channel must be configured before live smoke
check.stateFilePresent: The live state file must exist and be readable
check.stateFresh: The live state age must be less than or equal to {{maxAge}} seconds
check.decisionModeManual: decision_mode must be manual before live smoke
check.pauseOpeningEnabled: pause_opening must remain true before live smoke
check.openPositionsZero: open_positions must be 0 before live smoke
check.trackedNotionalZero: tracked_notional_usd must be 0 before live smoke

blocker.liveSecretsMissing: Live credentials are not fully configured
blocker.remoteAlertNotConfigured: Remote alert channel is not configured
blocker.stateFileMissing: Live state file is missing or unreadable

cli.description: Finalize the 24h rehearsal once it completes.
cli.runChecks: If rehearsal is complete, also run the post-rehearsal checks.

cli.description: Replay and summarize Polymarket runtime artifacts

field.coverage: coverage: startup gate, persistence halt, and reconcile ambiguity protections are all exercised.

startupGate.title: Startup / Admission Gate
startupGate.goal: Verify the runner blocks new risk when startup, account freshness, or reconciliation state is unsafe.

persistenceFault.title: Persistence Fault Halt
persistenceFault.goal: Verify ledger/runtime state write failures escalate into HALTED and cancel unsafe pending exposure.

reconcileAmbiguity.title: Reconcile Ambiguity Guard
reconcileAmbiguity.goal: Verify ambiguous multi-pending attribution is not auto-resolved optimistically.

testPurpose.systemTradingModeBlocksBuy: System trading_mode blocks BUY while still allowing SELL
testPurpose.accountStateStaleBlocksBuy: Stale account snapshot forces reduce-only behavior
testPurpose.reconciliationWarnBlocksBuy: Reconciliation warning blocks fresh BUY orders
testPurpose.runtimeStatePersistFailureHaltsOpening: Runtime state persist failure halts opening
testPurpose.persistenceFaultCancelsPendingBuyOrders: Persistence fault drains pending buy exposure
testPurpose.daemonStateWriteFaultSurfaced: Daemon state write fault is surfaced back into trader persistence fault handling
testPurpose.multiplePendingOrdersMarkedAmbiguous: Multiple pending orders for the same token are marked ambiguous instead of force-filled

cli.description: Run curated control-plane fault drills for the Polymarket stack
cli.category: Limit execution to one or more drill categories. Defaults to all.

cli.wallet: Wallet for positions endpoint smoke test
cli.historyWallets: Comma-separated wallets for real history smoke checks
cli.historyMaxWallets: Max wallets to probe in history smoke
cli.historyLimit: Per-endpoint limit for wallet history smoke
cli.resolutionLimit: Max recent closed markets to resolve per wallet
cli.skipHistory: Skip real wallet history smoke checks

summary.authRequired: {{name}}: auth required (401, expected for private endpoint)

history.noRecentData: history_wallet {{wallet}}: no recent data across active/trades/activity/closed
history.noResolutionFound: history_wallet {{wallet}}: parsed data ok but no resolutions found for {{count}} recent closed markets
history.ok: history_wallet {{wallet}}: active={{active}} trades={{trades}} activity={{activity}} closed={{closed}} resolved={{resolved}}

result.fail: FAIL: endpoint connectivity not aligned with expectation
result.pass: PASS: Polymarket endpoints are reachable from this environment

recommendation.startup_not_ready: Resolve startup readiness failures before trusting any live execution metrics.
recommendation.status_fail: Execution reconciliation is failing. Treat ledger/state drift as a production incident.
recommendation.status_warn: Execution reconciliation has warnings. Review stale pending orders and sync freshness.
recommendation.status_ok: Execution reconciliation is aligned for the selected day.
recommendation.no_fill_entries: No fill entries were recorded for the selected day.
recommendation.internal_ledger_diff: Internal PnL and ledger PnL differ. Reconcile before promoting results.

stage.stackBootstrapWarn: Stack bootstrap helper returned non-zero; continuing with direct validation
stage.stateApiUnavailable: State API unavailable or returned invalid JSON
stage.stateStale: State is stale: age {{age}}s, max allowed {{maxAge}}s
stage.monitorApiUnavailable: {{name}} API unavailable or returned invalid JSON
stage.reconciliationGenerationFail: Operator API failed to generate reconciliation report
stage.reconciliationApiFail: Reconciliation API unavailable or returned invalid JSON

recommendation.pass: Full flow validation passed. APIs, reports, and replay tooling are wired end-to-end.
recommendation.readinessReview: Operational readiness is {{level}}. Review startup / reconciliation / monitor recommendations before treating results as promotion-ready.

check.fullFlowValidation: The full_flow_validation report must exist, be PASS, and not be BLOCK/ESCALATE
check.rehearsal24h: The 24h dry-run rehearsal must complete all checkpoints without failure
check.remoteAlertSmoke: Remote alert smoke must be sent successfully to a real configured channel
check.liveSmokePreflight: Live smoke preflight must report ready in the real configured environment
check.liveSmokeExecution: A real live smoke execution summary must exist and report success
check.operatorDocs: Signoff / release / handoff drafts must not contain unresolved placeholders

blocker.rehearsalNotClean: 24h dry-run rehearsal did not complete cleanly
blocker.remoteAlertSmokeFailed: Remote alert smoke did not send successfully
blocker.liveSmokePreflightNotReady: Live smoke preflight is not ready
blocker.liveSmokeExecutionFailed: Live smoke execution summary is missing or failed
blocker.operatorDocsPlaceholders: Operator signoff / release / handoff drafts still contain unresolved placeholders

blocker.remoteChannelNotConfigured: Remote alert channel is not configured
blocker.deliveryFailed: One or more configured alert channels failed delivery

startupGateBlocked.title: {{mode}} · startup gate blocked
startupGateBlocked.body: startup_failures={{failures}} | warnings={{warnings}} | admission gate is blocking new BUY

accountStateProtect.title: {{mode}} · account state protect
accountStateProtect.body: account_state={{accountState}} | admission gate is blocking new BUY until account snapshot recovers

haltedTradingStopped.title: HALTED · trading stopped
haltedTradingStopped.body: primary_reason={{primaryReason}} | reasons={{reasons}} | operator intervention may be required
